text.content: I have a busy calendar, yet need to be available for others for help and support. Slack statuses are often used by people to see where I’m at.

rich_text.plain_text: I have a busy calendar, yet need to be available for others for help and support. Slack statuses are often used by people to see where I’m at.

text.content: Google Calendar has a native integration with Slack to update your status. Yet it didn’t provide much more context than “In a meeting”. I wanted to build something that would provide full transparency into my calendar.

rich_text.plain_text: Google Calendar has a native integration with Slack to update your status. Yet it didn’t provide much more context than “In a meeting”. I wanted to build something that would provide full transparency into my calendar.

text.content: I tried to build something similar using Zapier and Make, yet I found the platforms very limiting in terms of flexibility and often hit the pay wall. So with a little help from the AI friends we came up with this.

rich_text.plain_text: I tried to build something similar using Zapier and Make, yet I found the platforms very limiting in terms of flexibility and often hit the pay wall. So with a little help from the AI friends we came up with this.

text.content: This Google Apps Script syncs your Slack status with your Google Calendar events. It updates your Slack status based on the type of event you're currently in, the time until your next event, and your inferred working hours. The script runs every minute, ensuring your Slack status remains up-to-date with your calendar and working hours.

rich_text.plain_text: This Google Apps Script syncs your Slack status with your Google Calendar events. It updates your Slack status based on the type of event you're currently in, the time until your next event, and your inferred working hours. The script runs every minute, ensuring your Slack status remains up-to-date with your calendar and working hours.

text.content: Fetches events from your Google Calendar.

rich_text.plain_text: Fetches events from your Google Calendar.

text.content: Determines the current and next events.

rich_text.plain_text: Determines the current and next events.

text.content: Updates your Slack status based on the type and timing of events.

rich_text.plain_text: Updates your Slack status based on the type and timing of events.

text.content: Infers working hours based on busy and free periods in your calendar.

rich_text.plain_text: Infers working hours based on busy and free periods in your calendar.

text.content: Prioritises events based on your RSVP status.

rich_text.plain_text: Prioritises events based on your RSVP status.
